output: CI gate code (provenance linter + golden-test corpus harness) committed via PR, with CI green.
acceptanceCriteria: The provenance-completeness linter runs in CI and fails the build if any cleared item is missing any required manifest field.
The rights-gate golden-test corpus contains at least one example per rights category (eligible, ineligible, needs-review) drawn from known LoC items.
Negative cases are included; a wrongly-cleared negative case fails the build.
The golden-test corpus is committed under rights/audit/ and is human-auditable.
CI rejects any item whose rights value is not resolved by the approved vocabulary.
pnpm build and pnpm test and pnpm lint pass with the new gates active.
objective: Implement two CI gates: (1) a provenance-completeness linter that fails the build if any cleared item lacks a complete manifest; (2) a rights-gate golden-test corpus harness asserting known items produce the correct determination, including negative cases that must be quarantined.
context: The rights-gate and provenance-manifest must not silently regress. Two CI gates enforce this: a provenance-completeness linter that fails any build containing a cleared item without a complete manifest, and a golden-test corpus that runs known items through the rights-gate including negative cases in CI. Depends on rights-001 and prov-001. See PLAN.md (Tech stack, M0 exit).
title: CI gates: provenance-completeness linter + rights-gate golden-test corpus
